plays.summary: Cole Ragans is at 3.52 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average CHW lineup (95 wRC+). Tough spot for CHW's bats. 33°F further suppresses scoring, and 21mph wind blowing In from CF tilts under. No line yet — model is at 7.4 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.

game.venue_name: Salt River Fields at Talking Stick

plays.summary: Randy Vásquez is at a 5.05 xFIP this season — below average — and ARI's lineup is near league average at 101 wRC+. That's a favorable matchup for the offense. SDP's pen is taxed (20 innings last 2 days). The park (PF 98) gives pitchers an extra edge pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. No line yet — model is at 10.1 runs. Watch for a over when odds open.
